info.english_meaning: to speak to shineto glow to speakto kill
info.hindI_arTa: BAzaRa karanA bolanA mAranA SoBA pAnA camakanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: BAsane ityeke ' iti kOmudI  kzIrasvAmi - candra - jEna - kAtantra - hemacandrAdayaH na paWanti  ' hiMsABAzaRayoH SoBet SoBArTe SuBatIti Se ' (Slo.143) iti devaH
